updated.title: Password protection on Quotes (Public beta)
updated.description: Sellers can now require buyers to enter a password before viewing a quote, giving admins and reps control over who can access sensitive quote information. Enforceable across the portal or on a case by case basis. Quotes often contain highly sensitive details — pricing, contract terms, and company information that should only be visible to the right people. Until now, anyone with the shareable quote link could view the quote, which is a non‑starter for regulated industries or confidential deals.
